title: Intelligence Report - 2026-02-16
summary:
# Intelligence Report - 2026-02-16

**Genereret:** 2026-02-16 12:28 GMT+2  
**Analyseret af:** Warren (CRO)

---

## 🏆 Konkurrent Analyse

### Market Overview
- **Global POS Market:** $1.63B (2026) → $2.661B (2035), 5.6% CAGR
- **Cloud POS dominerer:** 61% market share
- **Market koncentration:** Top spillere kontrollerer 57% af markedet
- **Switching rate:** 44% af restauranter overvejer systemskifte pga. integration issues

### Major Competitors

| Competitor | Styrker | Svagheder | Target Segment |
|-----------|---------|-----------|----------------|
| **Toast** | Komplet feature-set, table management, KDS | Høje fees (kritiseret) | Complex operations |
| **Square** | Low-cost, scalable, offline mode | Basic features | Small/new venues |
| **Clover** | Customizable hardware, broad payments | - | Mid-sized spots |
| **Lightspeed** | Multi-site support, strong analytics | Onboarding complexity | Multi-location chains |
| **SpotOn** | Lower cost vs Toast, loyalty integration | - | Cost-conscious operators |
| **Epos Now** | Large inventory handling | - | Chains |

### Konkurrent Intel
- **SkyTab** rankeret højt i 2026 POSUSA rankings (ny trussel?)
- North America: 45% market leadership
- Trend: Unified commerce og AI-POS integration bliver standard
- **Differentiation gap:** 44% switching rate indikerer utilfredse kunder!

### Trussel Assessment
**Risk Level: MEDIUM-HIGH**
- Markedet er modent men ikke mættet
- Integration problems skaber switching opportunity
- AI-integration bliver competitive advantage
- Fee-frustration (især Toast) åbner døre

---

## 📈 Trend Analyse

### AI Adoption i Restauranter (2026)

**Key Stats:**
- **15-25%** stigning i repeat visits via AI personalization
- **40%** reduktion i food waste via predictive inventory
- **$50K** årlig besparelse per restaurant (inventory optimization)
- **95%** færre complaints via AI quality control
- **30%** energi-reduktion via smart kitchens

**Adoption Rates:**
- POS scheduling: 28%
- Self-service kiosks: 28%
- AI voice ordering: 29%

### Technology Shifts

**Hot Areas:**
1. **Predictive Inventory** - Forecast baseret på vejr, events, historik
2. **Personalization** - Tailored menus, dynamic pricing, allergen alerts
3. **Autonomous Kiosks** - Facial recognition, customized orders
4. **Voice AI** - Drive-thru og phone concierge
5. **Agentic AI** - Autonomous scheduling og menu optimization

**Operational Impact:**
- Computer vision for quality control
- Real-time stock tracking via sensors
- Automated staffing optimization
- Predictive maintenance

### Customer Behavior
- Demand for seamless digital ordering
- Preference for personalized experiences
- Growing acceptance of self-service tech
- Data privacy awareness increasing

---

## 💡 Key Insights

### Opportunities

1. **Integration-First Strategy**
   - 44% considering switch = massive TAM
   - Position as "unified platform" vs. piecemeal solutions
   - API-first architecture attracts developers

2. **AI Value Prop**
   - $50K/å

title: AI Video Generation Platform — Deep Research
summary:
# AI Video Generation Platform — Deep Research
**Dato:** 2026-02-16
**Kontekst:** Martin vil bygge AI video-generering ind i FLOW under "AI Medier"
**Inspiration:** Seedance 2.0, Nano Banana Pro, Holo-lignende platforms

## Opsummering

Der er to veje: **API-baseret** (brug andres modeller) eller **self-hosted** (kør egne modeller). For FLOW anbefales API-baseret til start.

---

## 1. Hvad Driver Disse Platforme?

### Seedance 2.0 (ByteDance)
- Multimodal input: tekst, billeder, video, audio (op til 12 assets)
- Text-to-video, image-to-video, audio-synkronisering med lip sync
- Op til 8K output, multi-scene storytelling
- API: Async job-baseret (POST → job_id → poll → download)
- Pris: $12-48/md credit-baseret

### Nano Banana Pro (Google/Gemini 3 Pro)
- Primært image generation med video som pipeline-step
- Genererer konsistente billeder → feeder til video-modeller (Veo 3.1, Sora 2, Kling)
- Fokus: Karakter-konsistens på tværs af shots

### Open Source Modeller (kan self-hostes)
| Model | Parametre | Min VRAM | Styrker |
|-------|-----------|----------|---------|
| Wan-2.1 | 1.3B/14B | 8GB | Kører på consumer GPUs, T2V+I2V |
| CogVideoX | 2B/5B | 12GB | Begyndervenlig, god community |
| Mochi 1 | 10B | 12GB | Kunstnerisk, smooth motion |
| HunyuanVideo | 13B | ~24GB | Cinematisk kvalitet |

---

## 2. Arkitektur for FLOW Integration

### Anbefalet: API-First Tilgang

```
[FLOW Frontend] → [FLOW Backend/Supabase] → [GPU API Provider]
     ↓                    ↓                        ↓
  Prompt UI          Job Queue              fal.ai / Replicate
  Preview            Status Polling          Wan2.1 / Kling / etc.
  Download           Credit System           Video Generation
```

**Komponenter:**
1. **Frontend:** Prompt input, model-valg, preview gallery, download
2. **Backend:** Supabase Edge Functions for job management
3. **GPU Provider:** fal.ai eller Replicate (serverless, pay-per-video)
4. **Storage:** Supabase Storage / S3 for færdige videoer
5. **Queue:** Async jobs med polling/webhooks

### API Flow:
1. Bruger skriver prompt + uploader billede (valgfrit)
2. Backend sender til fal.ai/Replicate API
3. Returnerer job_id, frontend poller status
4. Når færdig → video URL → gem i Supabase Storage
5. Vis i brugerens galleri

---

## 3. GPU API Priser (per video, 5 sek)

| Platform | Model | Pris/video |
|----------|-------|------------|
| fal.ai | Kling 1.6 Pro | ~$0.48 |
| fal.ai | Hunyuan Video | ~$0.40 |
| Replicate | Kling v1.6 Pro | ~$0.49 |
| Replicate | Veo 2 | ~$2.50 |

**FLOW markup:** 50-100% → sælg til $1-5 per video til slutbruger.

---

## 4. Self-Hosted Alternativ (Senere)

Kræver: NVIDIA GPU (RTX 4090 eller A100), Docker, model serving.
- RunPod: A100 pod ~$1.19-1.89/hr
- Wan-2.1 14B: ~4 min per 5s video på RTX 4090
- Kun relevant ved høj volumen (>1000 videoer/dag)

---

## 5. MVP Features for FLOW "AI Medier"

### Fase 1 (MVP)
- [ ] Text-to-video generation
- [ ] Image-to-video generation
- [ ] Model-valg (2-3 modeller)
- [ ] J
